> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add cloudflare/skills --skill cloudflare --skill wrangler --skill workers-best-practices --skill durable-objects --skill agents-sdk -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/agents-sdk`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/agents-sdk.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add cloudflare/skills --skill cloudflare --skill wrangler --skill workers-best-practices --skill durable-objects --skill agents-sdk -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

agents-sdk teaches building stateful AI agents on Cloudflare Workers with the Agents SDK. It covers Agent class, persistent SQLite-backed state with client sync, @callable RPC, scheduling (one-time, recurring, cron), Workflows for durable multi-step execution, queues, retries, hibernation WebSockets, MCP client/server, email handling, React hooks (useAgent, useAgentChat), observability, and experimental voice/browser tools. Strongly biases toward live retrieval from developers.cloudflare.com/agents.

## Install Prerequisites

`npx skills add cloudflare/skills --skill agents-sdk -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`

Requires a Workers project with `agents` package, Durable Objects bindings/migrations, and usually `nodejs_compat`.

## Upstream Maintainer

Cloudflare (https://github.com/cloudflare/skills). Docs hub: https://developers.cloudflare.com/agents/

## Comparable Alternatives

Other agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen) with their hosting patterns; plain Workers + DO for lighter state; Vercel or other edge runtimes when not tied to Cloudflare.

&gt; Evidence gathered from public GitHub (raw SKILL.md and repo README). Not an endorsement or authority; cross-check current Cloudflare docs for pricing, limits, and APIs.
